sections.paragraph:
verb להידבר

to talk, speak, converse; reach an agreement

verb לדבר

to talk, speak

verb דובר

be spoken, said; be agreed

verb להדביר

to destroy, disinfest; subdue, overcome

verb הודבר

be destroyed, disinfested; subdued, overcome

verb לדבר (>>דיבר)

talk, speak

masculine noun

word, speech, saying, utterance, say

masculine noun

plague, epidemic, widespread disease, pestilence

masculine noun

events, happening; something, anything

masculine noun

thing, object, matter, item

masculine noun דבר (>>דיבר)

speech; oratory; commandment
